mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employees ( name, email, password, position, role, active, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{email}, #{password}, #{position}, #{role}, #{active}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, email, password, position, role, active, created_at, updated_at FROM employees ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, name, email, password, position, role, active, created_at, updated_at FROM employees WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, email, password, position, role, active, created_at, updated_at FROM employees WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.update: UPDATE employees SET name = #{name}, email = #{email}, password = #{password}, position = #{position}, role = #{role}, active = #{active}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE employees SET active = #{active}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE employees SET role = #{role}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() WHERE id = #{id}
